description_long: This object is a modular shelving and cabinet system composed of multiple rectangular units in various sizes and finishes, including wood, metal, and possibly plastic. The arrangement features both open shelves and closed compartments, some with visible handles and others with plain fronts. The color palette includes natural wood tones, white, gray, black, and muted pastels, giving it a contemporary and versatile appearance. Several units appear to have glass or transparent panels, and there are a few decorative or functional items placed on or within the shelves, such as books, boxes, and small containers. The system is designed to be freestanding and can be used for storage or display in urban environments like offices, lobbies, or residential spaces. Its modularity allows for flexible configuration and adaptation to different spatial needs.
description: A modular shelving and cabinet system with a mix of open and closed compartments in wood, metal, and pastel finishes, featuring visible handles and some glass panels.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full array of shelves and cabinets, with visible handles, glass panels, and various finishes.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the units and the arrangement of compartments, with some items visible on the shelves.
description_view_2: Rear or alternate front view displaying the back panels and the modular structure, with less detail on handles and contents.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting the vertical alignment and the profile of the shelving system.
